series_metadata.series_description: These files contain records of banks closed by the Ohio Division of Financial Institutions.

retention_rules.trigger_desc: Paper: paper copy in operating area imaged and indexed. Upon confirmation that paper copy has been checked quality and completeness, . ; Microform: microfilm in operating area as well as off-site storage facility six (6) years from liquidation, consistent with statute of limitations bank record retention in O.R.C. Section 1109.69 ; Electronic: electronic files six (6) years from liquidation, consistent with statute of limitations bank record retention in O.R.C. Section 1109.69
retention_rules.disposition_method: Paper: Shred ; Microform: Shred ; Electronic: Erase
